title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Star Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Star Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Star Bazaar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!
